message:
fix(tests): update self_check assertions from "unconfigured" to "degraded" for 8 connectors

Connectors' handle_self_check() now returns "degraded" (not "unconfigured")
when the connector hasn't been configured. This is consistent with the
self_check semantics — unconfigured connectors are in a degraded state.

Updated: 1password, datadog, evernote, grafana, linkedin, logseq, make, retool.
Health assertions using "unconfigured" left intact (different semantic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
